steps.title: Create your personal profile
steps.desc: Enter all the information you want to share in an emergency.

steps.title: Get your QR identifier
steps.desc: Generate a unique QR code for your phone or link it to an NFC band.

steps.title: Keep your own mNieśmiertelnik with you
steps.desc: In a difficult situation anyone can scan the code to instantly see your info card.

landing.epuapHeadline: Data kept up to date thanks to full support from the ePUAP service
landing.freeUsageNfc: Charges apply only after ordering an NFC identification band.

login.title: Log in
login.error: Login failed. Check your email and password.
login.noUserId: The server response does not contain a user ID.
login.epuapNotImplemented: Logging in with ePUAP is not implemented yet.

register.title: Create a new account
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
register.success: Registration complete! Now fill in your medical data.
register.noUserId: Registration succeeded, but the server did not return a user ID. Please contact support.
register.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
register.epuapNotImplemented: Registration with ePUAP is not implemented yet.

logout.title: Logged out successfully
logout.message: Your session has been securely ended. See you again soon!

form.title: User details
form.subtitle: Fill in your medical data
form.name: Full name
form.saveError: Error saving data. Please try again.
form.saveSuccess: Profile updated! You can now log in.

dashboard.qrHint: Scan to see the info card.
dashboard.qrHintWallpaper: Set it as your phone wallpaper.
dashboard.regenerateQr: Block and generate a new QR code
dashboard.regenerateHint: Use this if you lose your phone or share the code with unauthorized people.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.deleteWarning: Deleting your account is irreversible. All your data, including medical information and generated QR codes, will be permanently removed.
settings.confirmMessage: This action is irreversible. Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account?
settings.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the account. Please try again.
settings.deleteSuccess: Your account has been successfully deleted.

errors.noToken: The server response does not contain a token.
